action.reasoning: Observation: Best test AUC still 0.7583 (iter17 e=320/h=896/d=0.55); iter26 got close val peak 0.7581/test 0.7579 with similar params but scheduler bug fixed and full ES working (stopped at ep25). train.py truncated in workspace (incomplete save at torch.save). ~6min left (~5 iters possible at ~70s). Analysis: Embedded LSTM-DKT (interaction embed + LSTM + per-skill FC + masking + clip/ES/scheduler) is strong and stable; val peaks >0.759 possible with slight capacity/rep boost (higher embed/hidden) + tuned lower lr/stronger wd/d to reduce overfitting gap. Full rewrite prevents truncation risks for ckpt/predict compatibility. Decision: Overwrite train.py (and minor predict update for robustness) with COMPLETE clean code (no verbose, full hparam ckpt save, robust ES/clip/jsonl-only, local /tmp val->test predict validation); use tuned params e=384/h=960/d=0.53/lr=9e-5/wd=1.5e-4/bs=32/epochs=65/es=15/sch=5 to target higher val peak/better test AUC. Run train+local validate then submit_eval on best_model.pt.
